contacts.name: Elena Petrova
contacts.title: Director of Compliance
contacts.notes: Concerned about ITAR data residency protocols

sales_transcript: [FRANK IRON]: Our biggest bottleneck right now is GovCloud visibility. We are flying blind on 3 major defense contracts. If Synapse can ground our project data without violating ITAR, we're in. [ELENA PETROVA]: I need to see the encryption-at-rest architecture before I sign off.

contacts.name: Dr. Aris Thorne
contacts.title: Chief Scientist
contacts.pain_point: CRISPR pipeline tracking is manual and error-prone

risks.description: Legacy system data integrity during migration

success_metrics.metric: Time to Market for Lab Results

sales_transcript: [DR. ARIS THORNE]: We can't afford a single missing step in our lab documentation. We're looking for Synapse to build the thread between our research and our delivery timelines.
